findings.title: Legacy loop lease bypasses parent begin authority and mints parent token
findings.rationale: begin_ralph_loop_lease enforces CODEX1_PARENT_LOOP_BEGIN only when no lease exists. If a legacy lease exists without parent_authority_verifier, the function takes the Some(_) path and mints a fresh parent_authority_token without requiring parent begin capability. This allows unauthorized escalation into parent-only review writeback authority.
findings.suggested_next_action: Require parent begin capability (or a valid existing parent authority token) when replacing a lease that lacks parent_authority_verifier, and add a regression test that seeds a legacy lease then asserts begin-loop-lease fails without CODEX1_PARENT_LOOP_BEGIN.
